title: juncus bufonius subsp. turkestanicus
intro: Juncus bufonius subsp. turkestanicus is a subspecies of Juncus bufonius, commonly known as the toad rush, a type of flowering plant in the sedge family Juncaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as acne and wounds. Herbal preparations of Juncus bufonius subsp. turkestanicus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, creams, and other topical applications for medicinal purposes.
